prompts.fixTests: Fix all failing tests and ensure they pass. Do not stop until all validation stages are green.
prompts.increaseTestCoverage: Increase test coverage to 80% and ensure all tests still pass. Fix any issues that arise.
prompts.fixValidationIssues: Fix all validation pipeline issues including linting, type checking, and test failures. Ensure complete validation success.
prompts.completeTasks: Complete all remaining tasks in the todo list and ensure all validation stages pass.
